item.author: sample@gmail.com (Bino Kochumol Varghese)
item.description: title: “{{ replace .File.ContentBaseName “-” " " | title }}” # Article title, automatically generated from filename date: {{ .Date }} # Article creation date, automatically filled lastmod: {{ .Date }} # Last modified date, can be same as date or manually updated later draft: true # Set to true for draft, false to publish. Default is draft when created.
